title: No Cheats
description: A simple mod that disables the use of any cheats in a singleplayer world
body: A simple mod that disables the use of **any** cheats in a singleplayer Minecraft world. This disables all commands and also disables the "Open To LAN" functionality. As future versions comeo out, I will make this mod compatible with them. For the time being, however, the only version compatible will be 1.21.11.
